name: United Club℠ Card
title: United Club℠ Card (Chase)
text:
Card: United Club℠ Card (Chase)
BEST FOR UNITED LOYALISTS AND FREQUENT FLYERS
Pros: Earn 4 miles per dollar spent on United purchases; 2 miles per dollar spent on travel and dining; 1 mile per dollar spent on everything else,United Club membership for you and your eligible travel companions at all United Club locations and participating Star Alliance lounges worldwide,Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry/TSA Precheck application every four years,Free first and second checked bags for you and one travel companion on the same reservation,25% inflight statement credit on eligible purchases
Cons: High $695 annual fee
Why we chose it: The United Club Card might charge a high annual fee, but it comes with the premium perks to match. Chief among them is United Club membership, which includes access to the airline’s airport lounges as well as those of some of its Star Alliance partners. But cardmembers can also count on other day-of-travel perks such as Premier Access for priority service at the airport, free checked bags and even a Global Entry/TSA PreCheck application fee credit worth up to $120 once every four years. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: This card is tailor-made for United loyalists. It comes with access to upscale United Clubs at airports, free checked bags, priority boarding and priority services at the airport. If you’re a United fan and frequently fly with the airline, the United Club Card is likely worth having.
Annual fee: $695
Rewards: 1 - 4X miles
Intro bonus: Earn 90,000 bonus miles after you spend $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.
Points valuation: 1.5
APR: 19.74% - 28.24% Variable,19.74% - 28.24% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99%
Benefits: Free first and second checked bags for the primary cardmember and one companion on the same reservation on United-operated flights. Enjoy a United Club membership ‚Äì up to a $650 value per year ‚Äì as long as you remain a Cardmember. United Club locations offer a place to work, relax, and enjoy complimentary beverages and snacks before your flight. The primary Cardmember and eligible travel companions will enjoy access to all United Club locations and participating Star Alliance‚Ñ¢ affiliated lounges worldwide.

If you already have a United Club membership, you will be reimbursed for the unused portion of your membership once you're approved for the card. Authorized users will not receive their own United Club membership and are only eligible for United Club access if they are traveling with the primary Cardmember. Up to $120 as a statement credit for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck¬Æ or NEXUS every 4 years as reimbursement for the application fee when charged to your card. Receive 25% back as a statement credit on purchases of food, beverages, and Wi-Fi on board United-operated flights and on Club premium drinks when you pay with your United Club Infinite Card. Receive preferential treatment to ease your way through the airport with priority check-in, security screening, boarding, and baggage handling privileges (where available). The primary Cardmember is eligible for Platinum Elite status in IHG One Rewards (enhance your stay with complimentary room upgrades and extended check-out as available, earn points towards free nights and elite points that never expire).* A statement credit will automatically be applied to your account when your card is used on purchases made at InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG) properties from 01/01/2024 through 12/31/2024, up to a maximum accumulation of $75 per calendar year. IHG properties include Regent¬Æ Hotels & Resorts, InterContinental¬Æ Hotels & Resorts, InterContinental Alliance¬Æ Resorts, Crowne Plaza¬Æ Hotels & Resorts, Hotel Indigo¬Æ, voco‚Ñ¢ Hotels, Holiday Inn¬Æ Hotels & Resorts, Holiday Inn Express¬Æ, Holiday Inn Resort¬Æ, Holiday Inn Club Vacations¬Æ, Atwell Suites‚Ñ¢, Staybridge Suites¬Æ, Candlewood Suites¬Æ, EVEN¬Æ Hotels, avid‚Ñ¢ hotels, Kimpton¬Æ Hotels & Restaurants and HUALUXE¬Æ Hotels & Resorts. The primary Cardmember of the United ClubSM Card is invited to enroll in Avis President's Club¬Æ and enjoy complimentary two-car class upgrades, guaranteed car availability, expedited rental service and more. Premier qualifying points (PQP) help you earn MileagePlus Premier¬Æ status, which provides you with an enhanced travel experience. You'll earn 25 PQP for every $500 you spend on purchases with your Club Card (up to 10,000 PQP in a calendar year) that can be applied toward your Premier status qualification, up to and including the Premier 1K¬Æ level. Visit united.com/premierOpens Overlay for details about earning Premier status. The primary Cardmember will be eligible to book award flights in United Economy on United or United Express with 10% fewer miles. You can be reimbursed up to $1,500 per person and $6,000 per trip for your pre-paid, non-refundable passenger fares, if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather and other covered situations. Reimburses you for essential purchases like toiletries and clothing for baggage delays over 6 hours by passenger carrier up to $100 a day for 3 days If you or an immediate family member check or carry on luggage that is damaged or lost by the carrier, you're covered up to $3,000 per passenger. If your common carrier travel is delayed more than 12 hours or requires an overnight stay, you and your family are covered for unreimbursed expenses, such as meals and lodging, up to $500 per ticket. Decline the rental company's collision insurance and charge the entire rental cost to your card. Coverage is primary and provides reimbursement for theft and collision damage for most rental cars in the U.S. and abroad. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft up to $10,000 per claim and $50,000 per year. You can be reimbursed for eligible items that the store won't take back within 90 days of purchase. Up to $500 per item, $1,000 per year Extends the time period of the manufacturer's U.S. warranty by an additional year, on eligible warranties of three years or less. Get complimentary access to DashPass ‚Äì a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar ‚Äì a value of $120 for 12 months - which unlocks $0 delivery fee and lower service fees on eligible orders for a minimum of one year when you activate by Dec 31, 2027.
Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/united-infinite-club-card-review/
